commands.review_summary:
The branch passes custom memory provider IDs through the gateway and Ollama memory adapter, adds endpoint/header cache identity fields, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +108. Total +115 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main omits `provider: providerId` in the gateway memory-specific adapter path and the Ollama memory adapter overwrites the provider with `ollama`. I did not run a live two-Ollama setup in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review and contributor action are needed because the patch has a sensitive-header redaction blocker, upgrade/index-identity risk, and missing external real behavior proof.
